prompt.content: Return a non-executable LinguisticPlanDraft. Select every admitted requirement_id exactly once and only its declared capability_id. Dependencies may reference only admitted requirement IDs. Report ambiguous terms in unresolved_terms. Do not create task IDs, agents, trust, credentials, contracts, schemas, artifacts, or authority. Reference labels are unavailable.
